add-sweet-pretzel.description: Add a sweet pretzel from Jamba Juice to the cart
add-sweet-pretzel.verifier: try { const cart = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state?.items; return cart?.length === 1 && cart[0]?.itemName === 'sweet pretzel' && cart[0]?.storeName === 'Jamba Juice (152 Kearny Street)'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-meal-under-10.description: Add a Meal Under $10 That Looks Tasty
add-meal-under-10.verifier: try { const cart = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state?.items; return cart?.length === 1 && cart[0]?.price < 10; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-cooler-bag.description: Navigate to Boichik Bagels and add a Blue Cooler Bag to the cart
add-cooler-bag.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; if (!state) return false; const cart = state.items || []; return !!(state.currentStore?.name === 'Boichik Bagels') && cart.length === 1 && cart[0] && cart[0].itemName === 'Blue Cooler Bag'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-most-ordered.description: Navigate to Philz Coffee and add 'Mint Mojito Iced Coffee' from the Most Ordered section
add-most-ordered.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; if (!state) return false; const cart = state.items || []; return !!(state.currentStore?.name === 'Philz Coffee') && cart.length === 1 && cart[0] && cart[0].itemName === 'Mint Mojito Iced Coffee'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-customized-croissant.description: Navigate to Gateway Croissant and add a Ham, Egg and Cheese Croissant with Large size, Light Salad, Fruit Portion, Juice, and Low Sugar
add-customized-croissant.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; if (!state) return false; const cart = state.items || []; if (!cart || cart.length === 0 || !cart[0] || !cart[0].customizations) return false; const customizations = cart[0].customizations; const isAllCustomizationsPresent = customizations?.includes('Large') && customizations?.includes('Light Salad') && customizations?.includes('Fruit Portion') && customizations?.includes('Juice') && customizations?.includes('Low Sugar'); return !!(state.currentStore?.name === 'Gateway Croissant') && cart.length === 1 && cart[0].itemName === 'Ham, Egg and Cheese Croissant' && isAllCustomizationsPresent; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-two-custom-lattes.description: Add 2 Caffè Latte from Starbucks: one vegan medium size and one low sugar small size
add-two-custom-lattes.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; if (!state) return false; const cart = state.items || []; if (!cart || cart.length < 2) return false; const lattes = cart.filter(item => item.itemName === 'Caffè Latte'); if (lattes.length < 2 || !lattes[0]?.customizations || !lattes[1]?.customizations) return false; const hasVeganMedium = lattes.some(latte => latte.customizations?.includes('Medium') && latte.customizations?.includes('Vegan Option')); const hasLowSugarSmall = lattes.some(latte => latte.customizations?.includes('Small') && latte.customizations?.includes('Low Sugar')); return !!(state.currentStore?.name?.includes('Starbucks')) && cart.length === 2 && hasVeganMedium && hasLowSugarSmall; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

search-target.description: Search for 'target' and navigate to Target Store
search-target.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; if (!state) return false; return !!(state.currentStore?.name === 'Target'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

search-starbucks.description: Search for 'starbucks' and navigate to a Starbucks store
search-starbucks.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; if (!state) return false; return !!(state.currentStore?.name?.includes('Starbucks')); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-pizza-restaurants.description: Search for 'pizza' to find restaurants that offer pizza
find-pizza-restaurants.verifier: try { console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] Checking pizza restaurants verifier...'); const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; const searchResults = (state.searchResults || []); const lastSearchInfo = state.lastSearchInfo; const searchVerifierConsumed = state.searchVerifierConsumed; console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] Search results:', searchResults.length, 'lastSearchInfo:', lastSearchInfo, 'searchVerifierConsumed:', searchVerifierConsumed); if (searchVerifierConsumed) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] Already consumed, returning false'); return false; } if (!lastSearchInfo) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] No search action recorded'); return false; } const hasValidSearchTerms = /pizza/i.test(lastSearchInfo.searchTerm); if (!hasValidSearchTerms) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] Invalid search terms for pizza'); return false; } if (searchResults.length === 0) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] No search results found'); return false; } const allRelatedToPizza = searchResults.every(resto => { const hasPizzaCategory = resto.categories && (resto.categories.includes('pizza') || resto.categories.includes('italian') || resto.categories.includes('pizzeria')); const hasPizzaInName = resto.name && resto.name.toLowerCase().includes('pizza'); const hasMatchedPizzaItem = resto.matchedItem && resto.matchedItem.toLowerCase().includes('pizza'); const isRelatedToPizza = hasPizzaCategory || hasPizzaInName || hasMatchedPizzaItem; console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] Restaurant:', resto.name, 'hasPizzaCategory:', hasPizzaCategory, 'hasPizzaInName:', hasPizzaInName, 'hasMatchedPizzaItem:', hasMatchedPizzaItem, 'isRelatedToPizza:', isRelatedToPizza); return isRelatedToPizza; }); console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] All results related to pizza:', allRelatedToPizza); if (allRelatedToPizza) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-pizza-restaurants] PASSED - Marking as consumed'); const cartStore = window.useCartStore?.getState(); if (cartStore?.markSearchVerifierConsumed) cartStore.markSearchVerifierConsumed(); } return allRelatedToPizza; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

find-dessert-restaurants.description: Search for dessert restaurants with average price range ($ or $$)
find-dessert-restaurants.verifier: try { console.log('[VERIFIER find-dessert-restaurants] Checking dessert restaurants verifier...'); const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; const searchResults = (state.searchResults || []); const lastSearchInfo = state.lastSearchInfo; const searchVerifierConsumed = state.searchVerifierConsumed; console.log('[VERIFIER find-dessert-restaurants] Search results:', searchResults.length, 'lastSearchInfo:', lastSearchInfo, 'searchVerifierConsumed:', searchVerifierConsumed); if (searchVerifierConsumed) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-dessert-restaurants] Already consumed, returning false'); return false; } if (!lastSearchInfo) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-dessert-restaurants] No search action recorded'); return false; } const hasValidSearchTerms = /dessert|sweet|cake|bakery|pastry/i.test(lastSearchInfo.searchTerm); if (!hasValidSearchTerms) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-dessert-restaurants] Invalid search terms for dessert restaurants'); return false; } if (searchResults.length === 0) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-dessert-restaurants] No search results found'); return false; } const areAllDessertRelated = searchResults.every(resto => { const hasDessertCategory = resto.categories?.includes('desserts'); const hasBakeryCategory = resto.categories?.includes('bakery'); const hasDessertInName = resto.name?.toLowerCase().includes('dessert') || resto.name?.toLowerCase().includes('sweet') || resto.name?.toLowerCase().includes('cake') || resto.name?.toLowerCase().includes('bakery'); const hasDessertInCuisine = resto.cuisine?.toLowerCase().includes('dessert') || resto.cuisine?.toLowerCase().includes('bakery'); const hasDessertMatchedItem = resto.matchedItem?.toLowerCase().includes('dessert') || resto.matchedItem?.toLowerCase().includes('cake') || resto.matchedItem?.toLowerCase().includes('sweet'); const isDessertRelated = hasDessertCategory || hasBakeryCategory || hasDessertInName || hasDessertInCuisine || hasDessertMatchedItem; console.log('[VERIFIER find-dessert-restaurants] Restaurant:', resto.name, '- Dessert category:', hasDessertCategory, 'Bakery category:', hasBakeryCategory, 'Dessert in name:', hasDessertInName, 'Dessert related:', isDessertRelated); return isDessertRelated; }); const doesAllHasAveragePriceRange = searchResults.filter(resto => resto.priceRange === '$' || resto.priceRange === '$$').length === searchResults.length; const isValidDessertSearch = areAllDessertRelated && doesAllHasAveragePriceRange; console.log('[VERIFIER find-dessert-restaurants] All dessert related:', areAllDessertRelated, 'All have average price range:', doesAllHasAveragePriceRange, 'Valid search:', isValidDessertSearch); if (isValidDessertSearch) { console.log('[VERIFIER find-dessert-restaurants] PASSED - Marking as consumed'); const cartStore = window.useCartStore?.getState(); if (cartStore?.markSearchVerifierConsumed) cartStore.markSearchVerifierConsumed(); } return isValidDessertSearch; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

remove-item-from-cart.description: Remove items from cart until only a Burger remains
remove-item-from-cart.verifier: try { console.log('[VERIFIER remove-item-from-cart] Checking remove item from cart verifier...'); const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; const cart = state.items; const lastRemovalInfo = state.lastRemovalInfo; const removalVerifierConsumed = state.removalVerifierConsumed; console.log('[VERIFIER remove-item-from-cart] Cart length:', cart.length, 'lastRemovalInfo:', lastRemovalInfo, 'removalVerifierConsumed:', removalVerifierConsumed); if (removalVerifierConsumed) { console.log('[VERIFIER remove-item-from-cart] Already consumed, returning false'); return false; } if (!lastRemovalInfo) { console.log('[VERIFIER remove-item-from-cart] No removal action recorded'); return false; } const currentHasBurger = cart.length === 1 && cart[0]?.itemName?.toLowerCase().includes('burger'); const hadMultipleItemsBefore = lastRemovalInfo.cartLengthBefore > 1; const isValidRemoval = currentHasBurger && hadMultipleItemsBefore; console.log('[VERIFIER remove-item-from-cart] Current has burger:', currentHasBurger, 'Had multiple before:', hadMultipleItemsBefore, 'Valid removal:', isValidRemoval); if (isValidRemoval) { console.log('[VERIFIER remove-item-from-cart] PASSED - Marking as consumed'); const cartStore = window.useCartStore?.getState(); if (cartStore?.markRemovalVerifierConsumed) cartStore.markRemovalVerifierConsumed(); } return isValidRemoval; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

clear-cart.description: Add 3 Items and Clear the Cart
clear-cart.verifier: try { console.log('[VERIFIER clear-cart] Checking clear cart verifier...'); const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; const cart = state.items; const lastClearInfo = state.lastClearInfo; const verifierConsumed = state.verifierConsumed; console.log('[VERIFIER clear-cart] Cart length:', cart.length, 'lastClearInfo:', lastClearInfo, 'verifierConsumed:', verifierConsumed); if (verifierConsumed) { console.log('[VERIFIER clear-cart] Already consumed, returning false'); return false; } if (!lastClearInfo) { console.log('[VERIFIER clear-cart] No clear action recorded'); return false; } const hasValidClear = lastClearInfo.itemsBeforeClear === 3 && cart.length === 0; console.log('[VERIFIER clear-cart] Valid clear (exactly 3 items cleared):', hasValidClear, 'Items before clear:', lastClearInfo.itemsBeforeClear); if (hasValidClear) { console.log('[VERIFIER clear-cart] PASSED - Marking as consumed in localStorage'); const cartData = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart')); cartData.state.verifierConsumed = true; localStorage.setItem('multicategory-cart', JSON.stringify(cartData)); console.log('[VERIFIER clear-cart] Consumption flag set to true'); } return hasValidClear; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-organic-eggs.description: Navigate to Sprouts Farmers Market and add 2 Vital Farms Organic Pasture Raised Eggs to the cart
add-organic-eggs.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; if (!state) return false; const cart = state.items || []; const eggs = cart.find(item => item.itemName?.toLowerCase().includes('eggs')); return !!(state.currentStore?.name === 'Sprouts Farmers Market') && cart.length === 1 && !!eggs && eggs.quantity === 2; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-vegetables.description: Shop for vegetables (cucumber, broccoli and carrot) on Target
add-vegetables.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; if (!state) return false; const cartItems = state.items || []; if (!cartItems || cartItems.length !== 3) { return false; } const hasCarrot = cartItems.some(item => item.itemName?.toLowerCase().includes('carrot')); const hasBroccoli = cartItems.some(item => item.itemName?.toLowerCase().includes('broccoli')); const hasCucumber = cartItems.some(item => item.itemName?.toLowerCase().includes('cucumber')); return !!(state.currentStore?.name === 'Target') && hasCarrot && hasBroccoli && hasCucumber; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-fruits.description: Go to Gus's Community Market and shop for fruits: 3 kiwis, 1 avocado, 1 bunch of strawberries
add-fruits.verifier: try { console.log('[VERIFIER add-fruits] Checking add fruits verifier...'); const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; const cartItems = state.items; console.log('[VERIFIER add-fruits] Current store:', state.currentStore?.name || 'undefined'); console.log('[VERIFIER add-fruits] Cart items count:', cartItems.length); console.log('[VERIFIER add-fruits] Cart items:', cartItems); if (!cartItems || cartItems.length !== 3) { console.log('[VERIFIER add-fruits] FAILED - Must have exactly 3 items, found:', cartItems.length); return false; } const avocado = cartItems.find(item => item.itemName === 'Avocado'); const kiwi = cartItems.find(item => item.itemName === 'Kiwi'); const strawberries = cartItems.find(item => item.itemName === 'Strawberries'); console.log('[VERIFIER add-fruits] Found avocado:', !!avocado, 'kiwi:', !!kiwi, 'strawberries:', !!strawberries); if (!avocado || !kiwi || !strawberries) { console.log('[VERIFIER add-fruits] FAILED - Missing required items'); return false; } if (kiwi.quantity !== 3 || avocado.quantity !== 1 || strawberries.quantity !== 1) { console.log('[VERIFIER add-fruits] FAILED - Wrong quantities. Kiwi:', kiwi.quantity, 'Avocado:', avocado.quantity, 'Strawberries:', strawberries.quantity); return false; } const isAtGusMarket = state.currentStore?.name === "Gus's Community Market"; console.log('[VERIFIER add-fruits] At correct store:', isAtGusMarket); return isAtGusMarket; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-milk-from-safeway.description: Search for Safeway in the Grocery section and add a gallon of milk to the cart
add-milk-from-safeway.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; if (!state) return false; const searchResults = (state.searchResults || []); if (searchResults[0] && searchResults[0].name !== 'Safeway') return false; const cartItems = state.items || []; return !!(state.currentStore?.name === 'Safeway') && cartItems.length == 1 && cartItems[0] && cartItems[0].itemName?.toLowerCase().includes('milk') && cartItems[0].quantity == 1; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-gift-from-michaels.description: Navigate to Michaels and add a $2.99 gift item to the cart
add-gift-from-michaels.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; if (!state) return false; const cartItems = state.items || []; return !!(state.currentStore?.name === 'Michaels') && cartItems.length == 1 && cartItems[0] && cartItems[0].price == '$2.99'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-headphones.description: Navigate to Best Buy and add 2 JBL TUNE520BT wireless headphones to the cart
add-headphones.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; if (!state) return false; const cartItems = state.items || []; return !!(state.currentStore?.name === 'Best Buy') && cartItems.length == 1 && cartItems[0] && cartItems[0].quantity == 2 && cartItems[0].itemName == 'JBL - TUNE520BT wireless on-ear headphones - Black'; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-airpods.description: Search for Best Buy in the Retail section and add a pair of AirPods Pro 2 to the cart
add-airpods.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; if (!state) return false; const cart = state.items || []; return !!(state.currentStore?.name?.includes('Best Buy')) && cart.length === 1 && cart[0] && cart[0].itemName?.includes('Apple - AirPods Pro 2'); } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

add-pet-items.description: Search for a dog poop bag and a cat shampoo on PetSmart and add it to the cart
add-pet-items.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; if (!state) return false; const cartItems = state.items || []; if (!cartItems || cartItems.length < 2) return false; const poopBags = cartItems.find(item => item.itemName === 'Earth Rated Dog Poop Bags Refill Roll Unscented (120 ct)'); const catShampoo = cartItems.find(item => item.itemName === 'Advantage Treatment Shampoo for Cats & Kittens (8 oz)'); return !!(state.currentStore?.name === 'PetSmart') && cartItems.length == 2 && poopBags && poopBags.quantity == 1 && catShampoo && catShampoo.quantity == 1; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

order-7eleven-with-tip.description: Order 2 Lays Crisps, 1 fruit punch and 1 red bull from 7-Eleven, and add a $5 tip. Close the popup
order-7eleven-with-tip.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; const lastOrderInfo = state?.lastOrderInfo; const orderVerifierConsumed = state?.orderVerifierConsumed; if (orderVerifierConsumed) return false; if (!lastOrderInfo || !lastOrderInfo.isCompleted) return false; const isSevenEleven = lastOrderInfo.storeName?.toLowerCase().includes('7-eleven') || lastOrderInfo.storeName?.toLowerCase().includes('seven eleven'); if (!isSevenEleven || lastOrderInfo.tipAmount !== 5) return false; const orderItems = lastOrderInfo.items || []; let laysCount = 0; let fruitPunchCount = 0; let redBullCount = 0; orderItems.forEach(item => { const itemName = item.itemName?.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, '') || ''; if (itemName.includes('lay') && itemName.includes('crisp')) laysCount += item.quantity; if (itemName.includes('fruit') && itemName.includes('punch')) fruitPunchCount += item.quantity; if (itemName.includes('red') && itemName.includes('bull')) redBullCount += item.quantity; }); const hasCorrectItems = laysCount === 2 && fruitPunchCount === 1 && redBullCount === 1; if (!hasCorrectItems) return false; const currentState = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}'); if (!currentState.state) currentState.state = {}; currentState.state.orderVerifierConsumed = true; localStorage.setItem('multicategory-cart', JSON.stringify(currentState)); return true; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

buy-dog-cupcake.description: Buy a cupcake for my dog from pets section
buy-dog-cupcake.verifier: try { const state = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}').state; const lastOrderInfo = state?.lastOrderInfo; const orderVerifierConsumed = state?.orderVerifierConsumed; if (orderVerifierConsumed) return false; if (!lastOrderInfo || !lastOrderInfo.isCompleted) return false; const orderItems = lastOrderInfo.items || []; let hasDogCupcake = false; orderItems.forEach(item => { const itemName = item.itemName?.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, '') || ''; if ((itemName.includes('dog') && itemName.includes('cupcake')) || (itemName.includes('puppy') && itemName.includes('cupcake')) || (itemName.includes('canine') && itemName.includes('cupcake')) || itemName.includes('pupcake')) { hasDogCupcake = true; } }); if (!hasDogCupcake) return false; const currentState = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('multicategory-cart') || '{}'); if (!currentState.state) currentState.state = {}; currentState.state.orderVerifierConsumed = true; localStorage.setItem('multicategory-cart', JSON.stringify(currentState)); return true; } catch (error) { console.error('Verifier error:', error); return false; }

sequential-starbucks-bagel.description: Order a latte from Starbucks first, then order any bagel from any restaurant
sequential-starbucks-bagel.verifier: try { console.log('[VERIFIER sequential-starbucks-bagel] Starting sequential order verifier...'); setTimeout(() => { const ordersStoreData = localStorage.getItem('orders-store'); if (ordersStoreData) { const parsed = JSON.parse(ordersStoreData); const orders = parsed.state?.orders || []; console.log('[VERIFIER sequential-starbucks-bagel] Fresh localStorage check - orders:', orders.length); if (orders.length >= 2) { const sorted = orders.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.orderDate).getTime() - new Date(a.orderDate).getTime()); const recent = sorted.slice(0, 2); console.log('[VERIFIER sequential-starbucks-bagel] 🎯 Recent orders:', recent.map(o => `${o.restaurantName}: ${o.items?.map(i => i.name).join(', ')}`)); const starbucksLatte = recent[1]?.restaurantName?.toLowerCase().includes('starbucks') && recent[1]?.items?.some(item => item.name?.toLowerCase().includes('latte')); const bagel = recent[0]?.items?.some(item => item.name?.toLowerCase().includes('bagel')); if (starbucksLatte && bagel) { console.log('[VERIFIER sequential-starbucks-bagel] ✅ SUCCESS: Perfect sequence detected!'); } else { console.log('[VERIFIER sequential-starbucks-bagel] ❌ FAILED: Sequence not correct. Starbucks latte:', starbucksLatte, 'Bagel:', bagel); } } } }, 100); const ordersStoreRaw = localStorage.getItem('orders-store'); const ordersStoreParsed = JSON.parse(ordersStoreRaw || '{}'); const ordersStore = ordersStoreParsed.state?.orders || []; console.log('[VERIFIER sequential-starbucks-bagel] Total orders found:', ordersStore.length); if (ordersStore.length < 2) { console.log('[VERIFIER sequential-starbucks-bagel] FAILED: Need at least 2 orders to verify sequence, found:', ordersStore.length); return false; } const sortedOrders = ordersStore.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.orderDate).getTime() - new Date(a.orderDate).getTime()); const mostRecentOrder = sortedOrders[0]; const secondMostRecentOrder = sortedOrders[1]; console.log('[VERIFIER sequential-starbucks-bagel] Most recent order:', mostRecentOrder.restaurantName, '- Items:', mostRecentOrder.items?.map(item => item.name).join(', ')); console.log('[VERIFIER sequential-starbucks-bagel] Second most recent order:', secondMostRecentOrder.restaurantName, '- Items:', secondMostRecentOrder.items?.map(item => item.name).join(', ')); const firstOrderIsStarbucksLatte = secondMostRecentOrder.restaurantName?.toLowerCase().includes('starbucks') && secondMostRecentOrder.items?.some(item => item.name?.toLowerCase().includes('latte')); const secondOrderHasBagel = mostRecentOrder.items?.some(item => item.name?.toLowerCase().includes('bagel')); console.log('[VERIFIER sequential-starbucks-bagel] First order (second most recent) is Starbucks latte:', firstOrderIsStarbucksLatte); console.log('[VERIFIER sequential-starbucks-bagel] Second order (most recent) has bagel:', secondOrderHasBagel); if (firstOrderIsStarbucksLatte && secondOrderHasBagel) { console.log('[VERIFIER sequential-starbucks-bagel] ✅ SUCCESS: Perfect sequence! Starbucks latte followed by bagel order.'); return true; } else { console.log('[VERIFIER sequential-starbucks-bagel] ❌ FAILED: Last 2 orders do not match the required sequence. Need: [Starbucks latte] then [any bagel]'); return false; } } catch (error) { console.error('[VERIFIER sequential-starbucks-bagel] Error:', error); return false; }

reorder-pet-treats.description: Latest order must contain ONLY: Icelandic+ Herring Cat Treats × 2 and Icelandic+ Dog Fish Treat Cod Skin × 1
reorder-pet-treats.verifier: try { console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] Starting pet treats reorder verifier...'); console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] 🐱🐶 Checking latest order for EXACT pet treats reorder:'); console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] 📋 Required: ONLY Icelandic+ Cat Treats × 2 + Dog Treats × 1 (no other items)'); const ordersStoreRaw = localStorage.getItem('orders-store'); const ordersStoreParsed = JSON.parse(ordersStoreRaw || '{}'); const allOrders = ordersStoreParsed.state?.orders || []; console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] Total orders found:', allOrders.length); if (allOrders.length === 0) { console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] ❌ FAILED: No orders found'); return false; } const sortedOrders = allOrders.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.orderDate).getTime() - new Date(a.orderDate).getTime()); const latestOrder = sortedOrders[0]; console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] 🎯 Checking latest order ONLY:'); console.log(`[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] Latest order: ${latestOrder.restaurantName} - ${latestOrder.items?.map(item => `${item.name} × ${item.quantity}`).join(', ')}`); console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] 📊 Order contains', latestOrder.items?.length || 0, 'item types'); const foundItems = { catTreats: 0, dogTreats: 0, otherItems: 0 }; const itemDetails = []; latestOrder.items?.forEach(item => { const itemName = item.name?.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, '') || ''; if (itemName.includes('icelandic') && itemName.includes('herring') && itemName.includes('cat')) { foundItems.catTreats += item.quantity || 1; itemDetails.push(`🐱 Cat Treats: ${item.name} × ${item.quantity || 1}`); console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] ✅ Found Cat Treats:', item.name, '× ' + (item.quantity || 1)); } else if (itemName.includes('icelandic') && itemName.includes('dog') && itemName.includes('cod')) { foundItems.dogTreats += item.quantity || 1; itemDetails.push(`🐶 Dog Treats: ${item.name} × ${item.quantity || 1}`); console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] ✅ Found Dog Treats:', item.name, '× ' + (item.quantity || 1)); } else { foundItems.otherItems += item.quantity || 1; itemDetails.push(`❌ Other Item: ${item.name} × ${item.quantity || 1}`); console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] ❌ Found OTHER item (not allowed):', item.name, '× ' + (item.quantity || 1)); } }); console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] 📋 Order breakdown:'); itemDetails.forEach(detail => console.log(`[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] - ${detail}`)); const hasCorrectCatTreats = foundItems.catTreats === 2; const hasCorrectDogTreats = foundItems.dogTreats === 1; const hasOnlyRequiredItems = foundItems.otherItems === 0; const isExactOrder = latestOrder.items?.length === 2; console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] ✅ Cat Treats (need exactly 2):', hasCorrectCatTreats ? '✅ CORRECT' : `❌ WRONG (found ${foundItems.catTreats})`); console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] ✅ Dog Treats (need exactly 1):', hasCorrectDogTreats ? '✅ CORRECT' : `❌ WRONG (found ${foundItems.dogTreats})`); console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] ✅ No other items (need 0):', hasOnlyRequiredItems ? '✅ CORRECT' : `❌ WRONG (found ${foundItems.otherItems} other items)`); console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] ✅ Exact 2 item types:', isExactOrder ? '✅ CORRECT' : `❌ WRONG (found ${latestOrder.items?.length || 0} item types)`); if (hasCorrectCatTreats && hasCorrectDogTreats && hasOnlyRequiredItems && isExactOrder) { console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] 🎉 SUCCESS: Perfect reorder! Latest order contains EXACTLY the required pet treats and nothing else!'); return true; } else { const issues = []; if (!hasCorrectCatTreats) issues.push(`Cat treats: need exactly 2, found ${foundItems.catTreats}`); if (!hasCorrectDogTreats) issues.push(`Dog treats: need exactly 1, found ${foundItems.dogTreats}`); if (!hasOnlyRequiredItems) issues.push(`Found ${foundItems.otherItems} unauthorized items`); if (!isExactOrder) issues.push(`Order has ${latestOrder.items?.length || 0} item types instead of exactly 2`); console.log('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] ❌ FAILED: Issues with latest order:', issues.join('; ')); return false; } } catch (error) { console.error('[VERIFIER reorder-pet-treats] Error:', error); return false; }
